content.problemStatement:
You're given three non-decreasing arrays AAA, BBB, CCC of length NAN_ANA​, NBN_BNB​, NCN_CNC​. We define,

f(i,j,k)=max⁡(∣Ai−Bj∣,∣Bj−Ck∣,∣Ai−Ck∣)f(i, j, k) = \max{(|A_i - B_j|, |B_j - C_k|, |A_i - C_k|)}f(i,j,k)=max(∣Ai​−Bj​∣,∣Bj​−Ck​∣,∣Ai​−Ck​∣) where 1≤i≤NA,1≤j≤NB,1≤k≤NC1 \leq i \leq N_A, 1 \leq j \leq N_B, 1 \leq k \leq N_C1≤i≤NA​,1≤j≤NB​,1≤k≤NC​

Find the **minimum** possible value of f(i,j,k)f(i, j, k)f(i,j,k) over all possible value of iii, jjj, kkk.

Note: Array AAA being non-decreasing means that A1≤A2≤⋯≤ANA_1 \leq A_2 \leq \dots \leq A_NA1​≤A2​≤⋯≤AN​.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NAN_ANA​, NBN_BNB​, NCN_CNC​ — the number of elements in the array AAA, BBB, CCC.
The second line of each test case contains NAN_ANA​ space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANAA_1,A_2,\ldots,A_{N_A}A1​,A2​,…,ANA​​ — the elements of array AAA.
The third line of each test case contains NBN_BNB​ space-separated integers B1,B2,…,BNBB_1,B_2,\ldots,B_{N_B}B1​,B2​,…,BNB​​ — the elements of array BBB.
The fourth line of each test case contains NCN_CNC​ space-separated integers C1,C2,…,CNCC_1,C_2,\ldots,C_{N_C}C1​,C2​,…,CNC​​ — the elements of array CCC.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the **minimum** possible value of f(i,j,k)f(i, j, k)f(i,j,k).
